seo.title: About Luma Spa | Professional & Relaxing Massage in Da Nang
seo.description: Luma Spa - professional massage in Da Nang, relaxing with premium foot & body care treatments. Book your appointment today!

hero.title_part2: but a journey to restore energy
hero.description: Luma Spa offers a warm, delicate, and professional Foot & Body care experience. We believe a relaxed body is the foundation of a balanced mind.

intro.title: A gentle and sophisticated body care space
intro.description_1: At Luma Spa, we focus on a comprehensive relaxation experience with foot massage, body massage, and energy recovery treatments. Each session is designed to help customers reduce stress, improve circulation, and restore balance.
intro.description_2: Our cozy spa space, pleasant scents, dedicated technicians, and professional service process aim to bring a sense of tranquility from the very first experience.

item_1.title: Deep Relaxation Therapy
item_1.description: Combining methodical massage techniques with a gentle experience, perfect for those needing recovery after a long day.

item_2.title: Sophisticated & Clean Space
item_2.description: Warm design, soft lighting, pleasant scents, and hygiene standards are emphasized in every detail.

item_3.title: Dedicated Team
item_3.description: Technicians are trained in customer care skills and professional techniques to ensure peace of mind during your experience.

cta.title: Care for your body, nourish your peace
cta.description: Book today to enjoy a relaxing space and professional care treatments tailored just for you.
